name: HR administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For HR administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual filing causes compliance risks and potential penalties. We automate payroll tax filings instead of manual filing through spreadsheets and paper forms.
target_audience: HR administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
problem_solved: Manual payroll tax filing processes lead to compliance risks and potential penalties.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual payroll tax filing processes lead to compliance risks and potential penalties.

one_liner: For HR administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual filing causes compliance risks and potential penalties. We automate payroll tax filings instead of manual filing through spreadsheets and paper forms.
